# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent service mesh security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: main-ingress-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: istio-ingressgateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "app.example.com"
    - "api.example.com"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: app-routing
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - "app.example.com"
  gateways:
  - istio-system/main-ingress-gateway
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /
      headers:
        x-forwarded-proto:
          exact: https
    route:
    - destination:
        host: app-frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 80
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
      retryOn: connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
    headers:
      request:
        remove:
        - x-powered-by
        - server
      response:
        set:
          strict-transport-security: "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
          x-content-type-options: "nosniff"
          x-frame-options: "DENY"
          x-xss-protection: "1; mode=block"
          referrer-policy: "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
          content-security-policy: "default-src 'self'"
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /
    redirect:
      scheme: https
      redirectCode: 301
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: api-routing
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - "api.example.com"
  gateways:
  - istio-system/main-ingress-gateway
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /v1/
      headers:
        x-forwarded-proto:
          exact: https
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api-service.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 8080
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
      retryOn: connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable
    headers:
      request:
        remove:
        - x-powered-by
        - server
      response:
        set:
          strict-transport-security: "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
          x-content-type-options: "nosniff"
          x-frame-options: "DENY"
    fault:
      abort:
        percentage:
          value: 0
        httpStatus: 500
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /
      headers:
        x-forwarded-proto:
          exact: https
    directResponse:
      status: 404
      body:
        string: '{"error":"not_found","message":"The requested resource does not exist"}'
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /
    redirect:
      scheme: https
      redirectCode: 301
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-strict-mtls
  namespace: default
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: ingress-allow-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - "cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account"
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH", "OPTIONS"]
        hosts:
        - "app.example.com"
        - "api.example.com"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: default
spec:
  {}
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: app-frontend-mtls
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: app-frontend.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 1000
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: api-service-mtls
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: api-service.default.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 1000
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
